title: Renaming Board Roles & Permission

posts.author: wikky-io (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Description

Enable customizable board role names at the account level, allowing organizations to rename default roles (e.g., Owner, Editor, Contributor, Viewer) to match their internal vocabulary and terminology, without changing the underlying permission logic.

What are you trying to achieve

What are you trying to achieve

Improve clarity, adoption, and user understanding by aligning board role names with each company’s internal language, processes, and governance model. This helps reduce confusion for non-technical users while maintaining consistent permission behavior across the platform.
